blockingIssues.description: On first enable, Sync Beacon settings does not immediately display the generated pairing code because the settings component only renders the code when config.syncBeaconPairingCode is already populated, while enable flow only toggles syncBeaconEnabled and relies on later background config refresh.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented the gh CLI output contracts that Sync Beacon pairing-code discovery and gist-scope parsing depend on in .factory/library/environment.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify tauri-fullstack validation guidance so workers distinguish browser-only preview checks from true Tauri-backed desktop flow validation, and do not claim full procedural completion when a desktop-only interaction cannot be exercised in browser mode.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The beacon-pairing-frontend review found the worker verified only a browser-safe preview and missed a first-enable Tauri-backed pairing-code generation issue.

rejectedObservations.observation: The worker transcript claims it followed tauri-fullstack Rust TDD procedure even though implementation edits preceded new tests.
rejectedObservations.reason: skill-procedure-specific and not a repository shared-state update; no durable repo-state change to apply from this observation.
